section_mutability_types.label: Parameterized Generated Section
section_mutability_types.description: Section is generated by the system from controlled tender-specific fields. Ordinary users do not edit the section text directly.

section_mutability_types.label: Locked Representative Text
section_mutability_types.description: Section contains representative locked legal text or section summary for the POC. Ordinary users cannot edit it. Full legal text may be expanded in production.

section_mutability_types.label: Configurable Schema
section_mutability_types.description: Section is populated through predefined fields only. Ordinary users configure values but cannot add arbitrary clauses.

section_mutability_types.label: Controlled Configurable Schema
section_mutability_types.description: Section is configured through approved options, criteria, thresholds, or rules only. Arbitrary additions are not permitted.

section_mutability_types.label: Structured Bidder Response Schema
section_mutability_types.description: Section defines bidder response forms or required form checklists. It is not a general upload area for completed tender documents.

section_mutability_types.label: Native System Module
section_mutability_types.description: Section is implemented through a Frappe module, child table, or structured data model instead of static document text.

section_mutability_types.label: Controlled Procuring Entity Authored Content
section_mutability_types.description: Section contains procuring-entity content entered through controlled fields or controlled text areas. It does not permit legal clause editing.

section_mutability_types.label: Controlled Attachment or Reference
section_mutability_types.description: Section represents controlled references or attachments, such as drawings, without allowing arbitrary substitution of the STD package.

section_mutability_types.label: Downstream Generated Documents
section_mutability_types.description: Section represents documents generated after later workflow events such as award or contract formation. Full downstream workflow is outside this POC.

sections.title: Tender Cover and Identity
sections.runtime_role: Provides generated tender identity, procuring entity details, tender reference, and template reference.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as the first summary section of the tender-pack preview.
sections.source_coverage: POC-generated front matter based on source STD cover requirements.
sections.poc_treatment: Generated from controlled tender identity fields rather than free-form document editing.
notes: This section is generated and is not a legal clause editing area.

sections.title: Invitation to Tender
sections.runtime_role: Generates the invitation summary using tender method, participation, security, deadline, and submission configuration.
sections.input_source: Tender identity, method, participation, security, and date configuration fields
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a parameterized Invitation to Tender summary in the tender-pack preview.
sections.source_coverage: Representative parameterized coverage of the source Invitation to Tender.
sections.poc_treatment: Uses controlled fields for procuring entity, tender description, method, reservation, security, submission deadline, and opening details.
notes: This section proves parameterized rendering of source STD front matter.

sections.title: Part 1: Tendering Procedures
sections.runtime_role: Preserves the source STD document structure for tendering procedures.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a structural heading only.
sections.poc_treatment: Included to preserve the document architecture without adding clause content.
notes: This is a structural heading and has no tender-specific configuration.

sections.title: Instructions to Tenderers
sections.runtime_role: Represents locked tendering instructions that ordinary users cannot edit.
sections.input_source: Representative locked text or summary from template package
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a locked-section summary indicating that full ITT text is controlled by the STD template.
sections.source_coverage: Representative POC coverage only; full ITT text is out of scope for POC.
sections.poc_treatment: Shows the locked nature of ITT without digitizing every clause.
notes: Ordinary procurement officers must not edit ITT text.
TDS fields are used to provide tender-specific data affecting ITT application.

sections.title: Tender Data Sheet
sections.runtime_role: Captures tender-specific data that supplements the locked Instructions to Tenderers.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a structured TDS summary grouped by business topic.
sections.source_coverage: Representative configurable coverage of key TDS concepts.
sections.poc_treatment: Uses predefined field schema. Ordinary users cannot add arbitrary TDS rows or clauses.
notes: TDS is a primary safe-configuration surface for ordinary procurement officers.

sections.title: Evaluation and Qualification Criteria
sections.runtime_role: Defines controlled evaluation and qualification settings for the tender.
sections.input_source: Controlled qualification, evaluation, preference, and threshold fields
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as an evaluation and qualification summary.
sections.source_coverage: Representative coverage of key qualification and evaluation concepts.
sections.poc_treatment: Demonstrates controlled criteria selection and threshold configuration without full evaluation workflow.
notes: This POC does not implement full evaluator scoring or award recommendation workflow.

sections.title: Tendering Forms
sections.runtime_role: Defines the required bidder response forms generated from tender configuration.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a required bidder-forms checklist.
sections.source_coverage: Representative form coverage for key Works STD bidder forms.
sections.poc_treatment: Demonstrates replacement of uploaded completed tender documents with structured bidder form schemas/checklists.
notes: The POC generates a checklist and schema metadata; full bidder submission is out of scope.

sections.title: Procuring Entity's Requirements / Works' Requirements
sections.runtime_role: Preserves the source STD document structure for procuring entity works requirements.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a structural heading only.
sections.poc_treatment: Included to preserve document architecture before BoQ, specifications, and drawings.
notes: This is a structural heading and has no tender-specific configuration.

sections.title: Bills of Quantities
sections.runtime_role: Represents the Works BoQ through structured Tender BoQ Item child rows.
sections.input_source: Tender BoQ Item child table and BoQ configuration fields
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a BoQ summary table in the tender-pack preview.
sections.source_coverage: Representative BoQ module hook and sample BoQ rows only.
sections.poc_treatment: Demonstrates that BoQ should be a native structured module, not a manually uploaded spreadsheet or PDF.
notes: Full BoQ measurement rules and detailed preambles are outside this POC.

sections.title: Specifications
sections.runtime_role: Captures controlled procuring-entity works specification summaries.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a structured specifications summary.
sections.poc_treatment: Allows PE-authored technical content through controlled fields without editing legal sections.
notes: Future production implementation may add richer specification authoring controls.

sections.title: Drawings
sections.runtime_role: Represents controlled drawing references or attachments required for works tenders.
sections.input_source: Controlled drawing requirement fields and future attachment references
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a drawing requirement/reference summary.
sections.poc_treatment: Demonstrates that drawings may be controlled references, not substitutes for the STD template.
notes: Actual attachment upload management is outside this POC unless represented as a placeholder.

sections.title: Conditions of Contract and Contract Forms
sections.runtime_role: Preserves the source STD document structure for contract conditions and forms.
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a structural heading only.
sections.poc_treatment: Included to preserve document architecture before GCC, SCC, and contract forms.
notes: This is a structural heading and has no tender-specific configuration.

sections.title: General Conditions of Contract
sections.part: Part 3: Conditions of Contract and Contract Forms
sections.runtime_role: Represents locked general contract conditions that ordinary users cannot edit.
sections.input_source: Representative locked text or summary from template package
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a locked-section summary indicating that full GCC text is controlled by the STD template.
sections.source_coverage: Representative POC coverage only; full GCC text is out of scope for POC.
sections.poc_treatment: Shows the locked nature of GCC without digitizing every clause.
notes: Ordinary procurement officers must not edit GCC text.
SCC fields are used to provide contract-specific supplements to GCC.

sections.title: Special Conditions of Contract
sections.part: Part 3: Conditions of Contract and Contract Forms
sections.runtime_role: Captures contract-specific parameters that supplement the locked GCC.
sections.input_source: Controlled SCC and contract parameter fields
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as an SCC / contract parameter summary.
sections.source_coverage: Representative configurable coverage of key SCC concepts.
sections.poc_treatment: Uses predefined SCC fields. Ordinary users cannot add arbitrary contract clauses.
notes: SCC is a second primary safe-configuration surface after TDS.

sections.title: Contract Forms
sections.part: Part 3: Conditions of Contract and Contract Forms
sections.runtime_role: Represents downstream contract forms that may be generated after award or contract formation.
sections.input_source: Security and contract configuration fields, plus future award data
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as a contract forms checklist in the tender-pack preview.
sections.poc_treatment: Shows which contract forms would be relevant without implementing full award and contract workflow.
notes: Full award and contract generation are outside this POC.

sections.title: Template and Configuration Audit Summary
sections.runtime_role: Displays template code, package version, package hash, configuration hash, validation status, and generation timestamp.
sections.input_source: Template manifest, package import metadata, validation results, and generation service
sections.output_behavior: Rendered as an audit/control summary at the end of the tender-pack preview.
sections.source_coverage: POC-generated control section not present as a source STD section.
sections.poc_treatment: Included to prove auditability and reproducibility from template package plus tender configuration.
notes: This section supports auditability and should remain generated only.
